MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-03-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Scott Hatch, Esq. 949-717-3000 of Call & Jensen, APC for Defendant Essential Living Foods through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

THE LAW FIRM OF CALL & JENSEN, SCOTT HATCH'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL.

Counsel's motion for withdrawal is GRANTED. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The court will sign the proposed order.

Counsel is informed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers is rejected. Moving party to re-submit a properly filled out form that is verbatim with the Court's ruling on the mandatory judicial council form. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, cjordan@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/RBU)
